message.content:
Explore the SDUI system in this project to understand the current adapter pattern. I need to understand:

1. Read src/services/sdui/adapters/index.ts - how adapters are registered
2. Read src/services/sdui/adapters/adapters.test.tsx - the test patterns
3. Read src/services/sdui/models/index.ts - the type definitions
4. Read src/services/sdui/registry/index.ts - how the registry works
5. Read src/services/sdui/renderer/ScreenRenderer.tsx - how rendering works
6. Read src/__stories__/MyOrdersScreen.stories.tsx - the real voucher list story for reference
7. Read src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/ - the real screen code

Be thorough - read ALL files completely.

content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll systematically explore the SDUI system to understand the adapter pattern, type definitions, and rendering architecture. Let me read all the files you've specified.

content.text: Let me read the voucher demo story to see a complete real-world example:

content.content:
1→import React, { useState } from 'react';
     2→import { ScrollView } from 'react-native';
     3→import { Text, Box, SeparatorHorizontal } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     4→import type { Meta, StoryObj } from 'storybook/internal/types';
     5→import type { SDUIScreen, SDUIComponent } from '../services/sdui/models';
     6→import ScreenRenderer from '../services/sdui/renderer/ScreenRenderer';
     7→import { registerAllAdapters } from '../services/sdui/adapters';
     8→
     9→registerAllAdapters();
    10→
    11→const VOUCHER_CARDS: SDUIComponent[] = [
    12→  {
    13→    type: 'voucher_card',
    14→    props: {
    15→      icon: 'icon-gas-station',
    16→      vehicleName: 'Voucher para abastecimento',
    17→      title: 'Valor em pontos',
    18→      titleDescription: '2.500',
    19→      date: 'Data do resgate',
    20→      dateNumber: '20/02/2026',
    21→      statusTitle: 'Status do pedido',
    22→      status: 'Finalizado',
    23→      typeTag: 'success',
    24→    },
    25→  },
    26→  {
    27→    type: 'voucher_card',
    28→    props: {
    29→      icon: 'icon-parking',
    30→      vehicleName: 'Voucher para estacionamento',
    31→      title: 'Valor em pontos',
    32→      titleDescription: '7.500',
    33→      date: 'Data do resgate',
    34→      dateNumber: '18/02/2026',
    35→      statusTitle: 'Status do pedido',
    36→      status: 'Enviado',
    37→      typeTag: 'success',
    38→    },
    39→  },
    40→  {
    41→    type: 'voucher_card',
    42→    props: {
    43→      icon: 'icon-invoice',
    44→      vehicleName: 'Cashback na fatura',
    45→      title: 'Valor em pontos',
    46→      titleDescription: '5.000',
    47→      date: 'Data do resgate',
    48→      dateNumber: '15/02/2026',
    49→      statusTitle: 'Status do pedido',
    50→      status: 'Pendente',
    51→      typeTag: 'highlight',
    52→    },
    53→  },
    54→  {
    55→    type: 'voucher_card',
    56→    props: {
    57→      icon: 'icon-document',
    58→      vehicleName: 'Desconto em multas e débitos',
    59→      title: 'Valor em pontos',
    60→      titleDescription: '3.000',
    61→      date: 'Data do resgate',
    62→      dateNumber: '12/02/2026',
    63→      statusTitle: 'Status do pedido',
    64→      status: 'Estornado',
    65→      typeTag: 'error',
    66→    },
    67→  },
    68→  {
    69→    type: 'voucher_card',
    70→    props: {
    71→      icon: 'icon-gas-station',
    72→      vehicleName: 'Voucher para abastecimento',
    73→      title: 'Valor em pontos',
    74→      titleDescription: '1.500',
    75→      date: 'Data do resgate',
    76→      dateNumber: '10/02/2026',
    77→      statusTitle: 'Status do pedido',
    78→      status: 'Cancelado',
    79→      typeTag: 'alert',
    80→    },
    81→  },
    82→  {
    83→    type: 'voucher_card',
    84→    props: {
    85→      icon: 'icon-parking',
    86→      vehicleName: 'Voucher para estacionamento',
    87→      title: 'Valor em pontos',
    88→      titleDescription: '10.000',
    89→      date: 'Data do resgate',
    90→      dateNumber: '08/02/2026',
    91→      statusTitle: 'Status do pedido',
    92→      status: 'Confirmado',
    93→      typeTag: 'highlight',
    94→    },
    95→  },
    96→];
    97→
    98→function buildListScreen(): SDUIScreen {
    99→  return {
   100→    id: 'voucher_list',
   101→    context: {},
   102→    header: {
   103→      type: 'nav_header',
   104→      props: { title: 'Meus pedidos', showBack: true },
   105→    },
   106→    body: VOUCHER_CARDS,
   107→  };
   108→}
   109→
   110→function buildEmptyScreen(): SDUIScreen {
   111→  return {
   112→    id: 'voucher_list_empty',
   113→    context: {},
   114→    header: {
   115→      type: 'nav_header',
   116→      props: { title: 'Meus pedidos', showBack: true },
   117→    },
   118→    body: [
   119→      {
   120→        type: 'empty_state',
   121→        props: {
   122→          icon: 'icon-shopping-cart',
   123→          title: 'Nenhum pedido feito',
   124→          description:
   125→            'Quando você usar seus pontos em pedidos, eles aparecerão aqui.',
   126→        },
   127→      },
   128→    ],
   129→  };
   130→}
   131→
   132→function buildFilteredEmptyScreen(): SDUIScreen {
   133→  return {
   134→    id: 'voucher_list_filtered',
   135→    context: {},
   136→    header: {
   137→      type: 'nav_header',
   138→      props: { title: 'Meus pedidos', showBack: true },
   139→    },
   140→    body: [
   141→      {
   142→        type: 'empty_state',
   143→        props: {
   144→          icon: 'icon-search',
   145→          title: 'Não há resultados para sua busca',
   146→        },
   147→      },
   148→    ],
   149→  };
   150→}
   151→
   152→type ViewState = 'list' | 'empty' | 'filtered';
   153→
   154→function VoucherListSDUI() {
   155→  const [view, setView] = useState<ViewState>('list');
   156→
   157→  const screens: Record<ViewState, SDUIScreen> = {
   158→    list: buildListScreen(),
   159→    empty: buildEmptyScreen(),
   160→    filtered: buildFilteredEmptyScreen(),
   161→  };
   162→
   163→  return (
   164→    <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
   165→      <Box p="xxxs">
   166→        <Text type="headingMDL" mb="nano">
   167→          SDUI: Meus Vouchers
   168→        </Text>
   169→        <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="xs">
   170→          Renders the voucher list screen entirely from JSON via the SDUI engine.
   171→          All 6 voucher cards with different statuses + empty states.
   172→        </Text>
   173→
   174→        <Box direction mb="xs" style={{ gap: 8 }}>
   175→          {(['list', 'empty', 'filtered'] as const).map(v => (
   176→            <Text
   177→              key={v}
   178→              type="bodySM"
   179→              color={view === v ? 'BRIGHT_COLOR_01' : 'DEEP_COLOR_01'}
   180→              onPress={() => setView(v)}
   181→              style={{
   182→                backgroundColor: view === v ? '#0066FF' : '#E0E0E0',
   183→                borderRadius: 8,
   184→                paddingHorizontal: 12,
   185→                paddingVertical: 6,
   186→                overflow: 'hidden',
   187→              }}
   188→            >
   189→              {v === 'list' ? 'List (6)' : v === 'empty' ? 'Empty' : 'Filtered'}
   190→            </Text>
   191→          ))}
   192→        </Box>
   193→
   194→        <SeparatorHorizontal mv="xs" />
   195→        <ScreenRenderer screen={screens[view]} />
   196→      </Box>
   197→    </ScrollView>
   198→  );
   199→}
   200→
   201→const meta: Meta = {
   202→  title: 'SDUI/VoucherList',
   203→  component: VoucherListSDUI,
   204→};
   205→
   206→export default meta;
   207→
   208→type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>;
   209→
   210→export const Demo: Story = {};
   211→
